description: Product Description Let‚Äôs Glo Axolotl is your stretchy, squishy, light-up best friend! Your Axolotl is interactive with a unique water activated feature inside to discover. Your cute aquatic pal is super squishable with fun stretchy tentacles and an irresistibly squishy sensory feature in your Axolotl‚Äôs tummy. Put your Let‚Äôs Glo Axolotl into their natural habitat of water and watch your Axolotl start to glow! Your Axolotl‚Äôs heart will shine bright when placed underwater. Watch as they float; just like a real Axolotl too! Directions 1. Remove the Animagic Let's Glo Axolotl from its packaging. 2. Insert 3 x LR44 batteries (included). 3. Squish and stretch the Axolotl's tentacles for a tactile and sensory experience. 4. Drop the Axolotl in water to activate the glowing feature and watch it float like a real Axolotl. 5. Enjoy the mesmerizing glow effect underwater. Safety Warning Warning: Not suitable for children under 36 months See more
